message:
feat: pass maxHeight to ConversationView and accumulate token usage

Use useStdout() to derive terminal height and pass conversationHeight
(rows - 4 for StatusBar + InputArea) to ConversationView, enabling
viewport scrolling. Accumulate input/output tokens across plan_end
events and reset on session_end.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
